lines: Stop. [short pause] Right here. [short pause] Whatever your mind is doing right now — the spinning, the what-ifs, the worst-case scenarios — we're going to interrupt that.
Anxiety is your brain's alarm system. [short pause] It's not broken. [short pause] It's just firing a false alarm. [short pause] And we're going to turn the volume down.

First, your breath. [short pause] Box breathing. [short pause] Four equal counts. [short pause] In. [short pause] Hold. [short pause] Out. [short pause] Hold. [short pause] This resets your heart rate variability — it's like a manual override for your nervous system.
Breathe in... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
Hold... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
Breathe out... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
Hold... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
In... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
Hold... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
Out... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
Hold... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
In... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
Hold... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
Out... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
Hold... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
In... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
Hold... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
Out... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
Hold... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
Good. [short pause] Now your body is calmer. [short pause] Let's work on your mind.

Here's what I want you to understand. [short pause] You are not your thoughts. [short pause] Thoughts are events. [short pause] They come and go. [short pause] They're not facts. [short pause] They're not predictions. [short pause] They're just your brain generating noise.
So instead of fighting a thought, we're going to do something different. [short pause] We're going to notice it. [short pause] Label it. [short pause] And let it pass.
Whatever thought is causing the most distress right now — bring it forward. [short pause] Don't push it away. [short pause] Look at it.
Now say this to yourself: I notice I'm having the thought that... [short pause] [short pause]
And fill in the blank. [short pause] Whatever it is.
Say it again. [short pause] I notice I'm having the thought that... [short pause] [short pause]

Feel the difference? [short pause] You're not inside the thought anymore. [short pause] You're watching it. [short pause] You're the observer, not the participant. [short pause] That distance — that tiny shift — is everything.
The thought is still there. [short pause] That's fine. [short pause] It doesn't need to go away. [short pause] It just doesn't get to drive.
Fear not, for I am with you.
You don't have to figure everything out right now. [short pause] You just have to get through this moment. [short pause] And you already are.
Breathe in slowly. [short pause] And out.
You're okay. [short pause] Not because the anxiety is gone — but because you're bigger than it.
